description: We push 6 injection payloads + 3 benign writes through PoisoningDetector and then trigger an overwrite storm. We verify the detector flags exactly the adversarial inputs.
summary: Injection wave: 6/6 blocked. Benign wave: 0 false positives (should be 0). Storm wave: 5 medium alerts (≥1 expected).
claim: PoisoningDetector blocks injection payloads with severity=high and flags overwrite storms with severity=medium; benign writes pass through unflagged.
